nasb.text: The servant brought out articles of silver and articles of gold, and garments, and gave them to Rebekah; he also gave precious things to her brother and to her mother.

esv.text: And the servant brought out jewelry of silver and of gold, and garments, and gave them to Rebekah. He also gave to her brother and to her mother costly ornaments.

cnv.text: 那僕人拿出金器、銀器和衣服送給利百加，又把貴重的禮物送給她的哥哥和她的母親。

ccb.text: 然后拿出金银首饰和衣裳送给利百加，又把贵重的礼物送给她的哥哥和母亲。

csbs.text: 那仆人拿出金银饰品和衣服，送给莉白加，又把珍宝送给她哥哥和她母亲。
